title: Vanilla Enchantment Plus
description: This update expands the maximum level of vanilla enchantments and adds the indestructible enchantment. It removes most of the enchantment restrictions, allowing for stronger enchantments.
body:
# Overview of this Mod
This mod adds one new enchantment and increases the maximum level of vanilla enchantments.
Basic vanilla enchantments are fixed at a maximum level of 10 and can be obtained from librarians, enchantment tables, and other sources.
# New enchantments
This mod adds an indestructible enchantment that prevents tools and armor from breaking.
